original_prompt: 给这套产品穿戴在一个欧洲新娘身上，场景是婚礼现场，无文案。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
A stunning European bride portrait wearing the [Subject Lock: luxurious bridal jewelry set comprising a tiara, V-shaped necklace, and drop earrings]. The bride has fair skin, soft wavy blonde or light brown hair gathered in an elegant updo to showcase the high, arched profile tiara with its seven distinct peaks and baroque-inspired crystal details. She wears a white lace wedding gown with a sweetheart neckline that perfectly frames the deep V-shape crystal necklace. The chandelier-style drop earrings sparkle against her neck.

The background is a blurred, romantic wedding venue scene, featuring soft white floral arrangements, hints of cathedral architecture or a sunlit garden arch, and warm, ethereal lighting. The atmosphere is dreamy, sophisticated, and royal. High-resolution photography, 85mm portrait lens, soft bokeh.

[Text & UI Layout]
Since no copy was provided, suggested commercial overlay text:
Main Title: "Eternal Elegance" (Elegant Serif Font, White or Silver foil effect, Center Bottom)
Sub Title: "Royal Wedding Collection" (Thin Sans-serif, smaller, below main title)
Placement: Keep the upper third clean for the tiara's brilliance; place text floating gently at the bottom over the dress fabric.
layout_logic:
This is a portrait-oriented composition focusing on the upper body. The key visual hierarchy is: 1. The Tiara (Crown) -> 2. The Face -> 3. The Necklace -> 4. The Text. 

*   **Subject Placement**: The bride should be centered, with the tiara clearing the top edge comfortably but commanding attention. Her chin should be slightly lifted to elongate the neck for the necklace display.
*   **Text Placement**: The text should be placed at the bottom 20% of the image, overlaid on the white wedding dress fabric. This provides high contrast for dark or silver text and doesn't interfere with the jewelry.
*   **Lighting**: Use soft front lighting (butterfly lighting) to illuminate the face and create sharp specular highlights on the crystals of the jewelry.
